data.title: tests/skills/*.sh bash tests not wired into run-all.sh or validate.sh --ci
data.description:
tests/skills/ contains bash test files (test-skill-nesting-depth.sh, test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh, etc.) that are NOT discovered by any suite runner in run-all.sh. The four runners are: hooks, scripts, evals, skills/run-python-tests.sh. Only the Python runner touches tests/skills/, so tests/skills/*.sh bash files are only executed by the pre-commit test-gate (via .test-index), never by the full CI validation suite.

Observed during: implementation-plan gap analysis for story 503b-4d1b.

Fix: Add a bash runner for tests/skills/ following the tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh pattern and wire it into tests/run-all.sh as a 5th suite.
